Bash(sshpass -p 'ineption' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.2.36 '
echo "=== vCenter \(101\) status ==="
qm status 101
echo
echo "=== ESXi \(104\) status ==="
qm status 104
echo
echo "=== Fresh ARP scan ==="
nmap -sn 192.168.2.0/24 2>/dev/null | grep -B1 -iE "\(bc:24:11:9d:3c:b2|bc:24:11:ee:2e:8c\)" || echo "nmap not available, trying arping..."
for ip in $\(seq 100 130\); do arping -c 1 -w 1 192.168.2.$ip 2>/dev/null; done | grep -i "reply" || true
echo
echo "=== DHCP leases ==="
cat /var/lib/misc/dnsmasq.leases 2>/dev/null || cat /tmp/dhcp.leases 2>/dev/null || echo "No DHCP lease file found"
' 2>&1)

Bash(sshpass -p 'ineption' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.2.36 '
echo "=== Check .117 SSH banner ==="
timeout 3 bash -c "echo | nc 192.168.2.117 22" 2>/dev/null | head -1
echo
echo "=== Check .120 HTTPS ==="
curl -sk --connect-timeout 5 https://192.168.2.120/ 2>&1 | head -5
echo
echo "=== Check .120 SSH banner ==="
timeout 3 bash -c "echo | nc 192.168.2.120 22" 2>/dev/null | head -1
echo
echo "=== Wider port scan for ESXi \(port 443\) ==="
for ip in $\(seq 100 140\); do
  timeout 1 bash -c "echo >/dev/tcp/192.168.2.$ip/443" 2>/dev/null && echo "192.168.2.$ip:443 OPEN" || true
done
' 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from pyVim.connect import SmartConnect
import ssl
ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context\(\)
si = SmartConnect\(host='192.168.2.120', user='administrator@vsphere.local', pwd='12qwaszx!@QWASZX', sslContext=ctx\)
content = si.RetrieveContent\(\)
from pyVmomi import vim
vm_view = content.viewManager.CreateContainerView\(content.rootFolder, [vim.VirtualMachine], True\)
for vm in vm_view.view:
    print\(f'{vm.name:30s} | power={vm.runtime.powerState} | guest={vm.guest.guestFullName or \\"n/a\\"}'\)
vm_view.Destroy\(\)
print\(\)
print\(f'vCenter: {content.about.fullName}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(sshpass -p 'ineption' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.2.36 '
echo "=== VM status ==="
qm status 101
echo "=== ARP for vCenter MAC ==="
arp -a | grep -i "9d:3c:b2"
echo "=== Full subnet scan for vCenter ==="
nmap -sn 192.168.2.0/24 2>/dev/null | grep -B2 "9D:3C:B2"
echo "=== Port scan any hits ==="
for ip in $\(arp -a | grep -i "9d:3c:b2" | grep -oP "192\\.168\\.2\\.\\d+"\); do
  echo "Checking $ip..."
  timeout 2 bash -c "echo >/dev/tcp/$ip/443" 2>/dev/null && echo "  443 OPEN" || echo "  443 CLOSED"
  timeout 2 bash -c "echo >/dev/tcp/$ip/22" 2>/dev/null && echo "  22 OPEN" || echo "  22 CLOSED"
done
' 2>&1)
